scripts.test: bun run build && bun run --filter tests test
scripts.ci:test: bun run build && bun run --filter tests ci:test
scripts.ci:build: cp README.md packages/react-sketch-canvas/ && bun run --filter react-sketch-canvas ci:build
scripts.release: bun run test && bun run ci:build && changeset version && changeset publish
scripts.pre-release: bun run ci:test && bun run ci:build && changeset && changeset publish
